## Checklist
- [ ] Verified this dish does NOT already exist in the Recipe List in README.md
- [ ] Verified this dish does NOT already exist as a file in recipes/
- [ ] Recipe file created at recipes/{dish-name-in-lowercase-kebab-case}.md
- [ ] README.md Recipe List updated with a Markdown link to the new recipe
- [ ] Allergens listed in the recipe file
- [ ] Safety notes included in the recipe file
- [ ] All content is written in English
- [ ] PR title follows the format: `🍽️ Add recipe: {Dish Name}`
